title: Két város: Regény három könyvben
summaries: "Két város: Regény három könyvben" by Charles Dickens is a historical novel published in 1859, set in London and Paris during the French Revolution. The story follows Dr. Alexandre Manette, imprisoned for eighteen years in the Bastille, and his reunion with his daughter Lucie. Against the backdrop of revolutionary violence and social upheaval, their lives become intertwined with Charles Darnay, a French aristocrat fleeing his family's brutal legacy, and Sydney Carton, a dissolute lawyer harboring unrequited love. As the Terror escalates, their fates converge in unexpected ways. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
